top3.sql:
WITH female_clients AS (
    SELECT 
        a.account_id,
        c.gender,
        c.birth_date,
        AVG(t.amount) AS avg_salary
    FROM account a
    JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
    JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
    JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'F' 
      AND t.type = 'INCOME'  -- assuming salary is recorded as income transactions
    GROUP BY a.account_id, c.gender, c.birth_date
),
ranked_female_clients AS (
    SELECT

WITH female_clients AS (
    SELECT c.client_id, c.gender, c.birth_date, a.account_id
    FROM client c
    JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
    JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'F'
),
oldest_female AS (
    SELECT account_id
    FROM female_clients
    ORDER BY birth_date ASC
    LIMIT 1

WITH female_income AS (

        c.client_id,
        c.gender,
        c.birth_date,
